title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 8–10, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Piman, nin jin, why only you guys are here?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: How can he sleep so much?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's true! I just saw it!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The ship has a skull flag, and has come down to the southern part of the shore!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And the symbol on the flag is of buggy's pirate fleet!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Actually,I have this disease that will kill me if I don't eat snacks...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Captain, aren't you always saying you want to be a real pirate!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: How can a pirate be afraid of other pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's right! And there are only three of them...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Let's fight for the village and peace!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
